task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Lexus RX (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $50575.00 and wholesale is $39960.00. Product features: Luxury crossover with hybrid option and Lexus Safety System+ 3.0. Reference: https://www.lexus.com/models/RX

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Lexus RX. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Lexus RX. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
